title: Part Feeding CalWiz Preperation
description:
Part Feeding CalWiz Preperation

Preperation

-  Prepare parts to be used to calibrate the feeder.  A certain quantity of parts is required for calibration.

-  When using a mobile camera, click the Jog Robot button to move the robot to the image-capturing position.

-  When using IO-controlled user lighting, click the <I/O Monitor> button in the wizard to turn on the light.
